title: Cobblemon Wild Extras
description: Mod that adds cobblemon caught indicator, wild terastallized pokemon spawns, gender indicator, mark indicator, and more!
body:
## Cobblemon Wild Extras

Cobblemon Wild Extras adds wild tera pokemon, wild hidden ability pokemon, mark indicator on a wild pokemon that spawns with a mark, gender symbol, and more.

**Features:**
- Wild Pokemon can spawn as tera
- Tera wilds can start battles already terastallized(turn 0)
- Stellar tera can appear as a rare tera roll
- Tera types can be weighted by biome, weather, and time of day
- Wild Pokemon can spawn with hidden abilities
- Wild Pokemon can spawn with a mark indicator
- Wild Name Tags


**Wild name-tag indicators:**
- Caught Poke Ball
- Mark
- Gender
- Hidden Ability
- Tera Type
- Type Icons


**Server Config Settings:**
- Tera wilds on or off
- Hidden ability wilds on or off
- Stellar tera on or off
- Weighted tera types on or off
- Tera spawn rate
- Hidden ability spawn rate
- Stellar tera rate

Compatibility:
- Cobblemon 1.7+
- Fabric
- NeoForge
- If Mega Showdown is installed, tera wilds get full visuals and proper battle-start tera behavior

Credit:
Thank you to JorMxDos for the tera icon usage: https://www.deviantart.com/jormxdos
Cobblemon for the regular type icons
